/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Tide-island.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/Tide-island.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Tide-island.dir/source/island.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Tide-island.dir/source/wayland.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Tide-island.dir/source/wlr-layer-shell-unstable-v1-protocol.c.o" "CMakeFiles/Tide-island.dir/source/xdg-shell-client-protocol.c.o" "CMakeFiles/Tide-island.dir/source/renderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Tide-island.dir/source/environment.cpp.o" -o Tide-island  -lwayland-client -lm -lwayland-egl -lwayland-client -lm /usr/lib/libEGL.so -lwayland-egl /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
